### Оценка параметров методом ESPRIT

```{r, include=FALSE}
setup_candidates <- c(
  "00_setup.Rmd",
  file.path("cssa esprit", "00_setup.Rmd")
)
if (!exists("cssa_esprit_setup_loaded", inherits = FALSE)) {
  setup_file <- setup_candidates[file.exists(setup_candidates)][1L]
  if (is.na(setup_file)) {
    stop("Cannot find 00_setup.Rmd")
  }
  setup_code <- tempfile(fileext = ".R")
  knitr::purl(setup_file, output = setup_code, quiet = TRUE)
  source(setup_code, local = knitr::knit_global())
}
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
wrap_frequency <- function(x) {
  ((x + 0.5) %% 1) - 0.5
}

row_dft_by_index <- function(signal_index, noise_vec) {
  series_length <- length(noise_vec)
  row <- matrix(0, nrow = 1L, ncol = series_length)
  row[1L, signal_index] <- 1
  row <- row + noise_vec

  list(
    z = dft(row)[1L, ],
    true_frequency = (signal_index - 1L) / series_length,
    signal_index = signal_index
  )
}

esprit_frequency_once <- function(signal_index, noise_vec) {
  row_dft <- row_dft_by_index(signal_index, noise_vec)

  fit <- Rssa::ssa(row_dft$z, kind = "cssa", svd.method = "svd")
  pars <- Rssa::parestimate(
    fit,
    groups = list(signal = 1L),
    method = "esprit",
    normalize.roots = FALSE
  )

  root <- pars$roots[1L]
  dft_frequency <- pars$frequencies[1L]
  frequency <- wrap_frequency(-dft_frequency)

  data.frame(
    signal_index = row_dft$signal_index,
    true_frequency = row_dft$true_frequency,
    dft_frequency = dft_frequency,
    estimated_frequency = frequency,
    estimated_frequency_aligned = row_dft$true_frequency +
      wrap_frequency(frequency - row_dft$true_frequency),
    frequency_error = wrap_frequency(frequency - row_dft$true_frequency),
    root_modulus = Mod(root),
    root_re = Re(root),
    root_im = Im(root)
  )
}

check_parestimate_complex <- function(signal_index = 18L,
                                      series_length = 100L,
                                      tol = 1e-8) {
  out <- esprit_frequency_once(
    signal_index = signal_index,
    noise_vec = rep(0, series_length)
  )
  out$ok <- abs(out$frequency_error) < tol && abs(out$root_modulus - 1) < tol
  out
}

sort_by_frequency <- function(df) {
  df[order(df$true_frequency), ]
}

esprit_frequency_dependency <- function(series_length = 100L,
                                        signal_indices = seq_len(floor(series_length / 2)),
                                        sample_size = 100L,
                                        sigma = 0.2,
                                        seed = 1111L) {
  set.seed(seed)

  samples <- do.call(rbind, lapply(seq_len(sample_size), function(rep_id) {
    noise_vec <- rnorm(series_length, mean = 0, sd = sigma)
    rows <- lapply(signal_indices, function(signal_index) {
      out <- esprit_frequency_once(signal_index, noise_vec)
      out$rep <- rep_id
      out
    })
    do.call(rbind, rows)
  }))

  samples$rho_mse <- (samples$root_modulus - 1)^2
  samples$omega_mse <- samples$frequency_error^2

  mean_df <- aggregate(
    cbind(rho_mse, omega_mse, frequency_error) ~ signal_index + true_frequency,
    data = samples,
    FUN = mean
  )
  sd_df <- aggregate(
    frequency_error ~ signal_index + true_frequency,
    data = samples,
    FUN = stats::sd
  )
  counts <- aggregate(rep ~ signal_index + true_frequency, data = samples, FUN = length)

  data.frame(
    signal_index = mean_df$signal_index,
    true_frequency = mean_df$true_frequency,
    rho_mse = mean_df$rho_mse,
    omega_mse = mean_df$omega_mse,
    mean_frequency_error = mean_df$frequency_error,
    sd_frequency_error = sd_df$frequency_error,
    n_samples = counts$rep
  ) |>
    sort_by_frequency()
}

plot_esprit_frequency_dependency <- function(df) {
  old_par <- par(mfrow = c(1, 2), mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1))
  on.exit(par(old_par))

  rho_ylim <- c(0, 1e-6)
  omega_ylim <- c(0, 1e-6)

  plot(
    df$true_frequency,
    df$rho_mse,
    ylim = rho_ylim,
    type = "b",
    pch = 19,
    col = "grey20",
    xlab = expression(omega),
    ylab = expression(MSE(hat(rho))),
    main = expression(MSE(hat(rho)))
  )
  abline(stats::lm(rho_mse ~ true_frequency, data = df), col = "firebrick", lty = 2)

  plot(
    df$true_frequency,
    df$omega_mse,
    ylim = omega_ylim,
    type = "b",
    pch = 19,
    col = "grey20",
    xlab = expression(omega),
    ylab = expression(MSE(hat(omega))),
    main = expression(MSE(hat(omega)))
  )
  abline(stats::lm(omega_mse ~ true_frequency, data = df), col = "firebrick", lty = 2)
}
```

```{r, include=FALSE}
parestimate_complex_check <- check_parestimate_complex()
stopifnot(parestimate_complex_check$ok)
parestimate_complex_check
```

```{r, fig.width=10, fig.height=4}
series_length <- 100L
sample_size <- 100L
sigma_noise <- 0.05
frequency_grid <- seq(0.0, 0.48, by = 0.02)
signal_indices <- unique(round(frequency_grid * series_length) + 1L)

esprit_dependency <- esprit_frequency_dependency(
  series_length = series_length,
  signal_indices = signal_indices,
  sample_size = sample_size,
  sigma = sigma_noise,
  seed = 1111L
)

plot_esprit_frequency_dependency(esprit_dependency)

dt_table(esprit_dependency, caption = "ESPRIT estimates", page_length = 10L)
```
